message:
Update beads tracker + bless demo showcase snapshots

- beads: add comment to bd-1jkx2 (mermaid showcase baseline update),
  add comment to bd-iuvb.17.8 (snapshot fix for guided tour landing),
  create bd-33wzv (wide-char continuation/orphan handling audit)
- snapshots: update app_guidedtour_80x24 for new landing controls
  (start step selector, speed adjustment, landing/in-tour keybindings)
- snapshots: update app_mermaidshowcase_80x24 sample count 1/24 -> 1/25
  after new Mermaid sample additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,10 +7,10 @@
 │        ╭────────────────────────Guided Tour─────────────────────────╮        │
 │        │A 2–3 minute auto-play tour across key screens.             │        │
 │        │Click, Enter, or Space to start.                            │        │
-│        │Controls while running: Space pause · ←/→ step · Esc exit · │        │
-│        │+/- speed                                                   │        │
-│        │Tip: You can restart anytime from the Tour tab.             │        │
-│        │                                                            │        │
+│        │Start step: 1/16 · Speed: 1.00x                             │        │
+│        │Landing controls: ↑/↓ or j/k step · wheel cycle · +/- speed │        │
+│        │· r reset                                                   │        │
+│        │In-tour controls: Space pause · ←/→ or n/p step · Esc exit  │        │
 │        │                                                            │        │
 │        │                                                            │        │
 │        │                                                            │        │
